blocked_veto_audit.note: Opportunity cost in USD requires per-row counterfactual PnL in blocked JSONL or a bars replay (see scripts/blocked_expectancy_analysis.py). Many deployments only log reason/score without precomputed counterfactual_pnl_* — then only counts/by_reason are reliable here.

exit_mfe_regret_audit.interpretation: Mean realized/MFE near 1 means exits capture most favorable excursion; low values suggest exit engine leaves money on table (if MFE is in comparable USD units).

final_verdict_signal_vs_exit: Exit / veto balance: inconclusive from automated fields — verify MFE USD scaling in exit_quality_metrics and add counterfactual_pnl to blocked logs for a definitive split.
